fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontVariationAxis` exposes the metadata for one axis in a variable font:
its four-byte tag, minimum, default, and maximum design-space values, and
whether the axis should be hidden from user interfaces.

Retrieve axis information from a typeface using
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.VariationDesignParameters> or
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.GetVariationDesignParameters*>.

## Examples

```csharp
var axes = typeface.VariationDesignParameters;
foreach (var axis in axes)
{
    Console.WriteLine($"{axis.Tag}: [{axis.Min}, {axis.Default}, {axis.Max}]");
}
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Describes a single variation axis of a variable font.
Gets or sets the default value of the variation axis.
fields.value: The default design-space value for this axis.

params.obj: The instance to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the instances are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether this instance and the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> are equal.

entries.signature: public override readonly bool Equals (object obj);

params.obj: The object to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the instances are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether this instance and a specified object are equal.
Returns the hash code for this instance.
Gets or sets a value indicating whether this axis should be hidden from end-user interfaces.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the axis is intended to be hidden; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the maximum allowed value for this variation axis.
fields.value: The maximum design-space value for this axis.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the minimum allowed value for this variation axis.
fields.value: The minimum design-space value for this axis.

fields.summary: Returns a value indicating whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> instances are not equal.
Gets or sets the four-byte tag that identifies this variation axis.
fields.value: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> uniquely identifying the axis (for example, <c>wght</c> for weight).
